text: If 3x + 7 = 22, what is the value of x?
A triangle has sides of length 5, 12, and 13. What is the area of the triangle?
What is the greatest common divisor of 84 and 126?
The mean of five numbers is 20. If four of the numbers are 15, 18, 22, and 25, what is the fifth number?
A circle has a circumference of 31.4 cm. What is its radius? (Use pi = 3.14)
How many prime numbers are there between 50 and 70?
A bag contains 4 red balls, 3 blue balls, and 5 green balls. What is the probability of drawing a blue ball?
The interior angles of a regular polygon sum to 1440 degrees. How many sides does the polygon have?
